"I;m seeing Simon tomorrow," Mary said.

Mary said she was seeing Simon____________ . 

(his/their/them/there)       (before/that night/the day before/the next day)

"We moved into the area two years ago," Bella said.

Bella said they had moved into the area two years_____________ . 

(his/their/them/there)       (before/that night/the day before/the next day)

"Our teacher is giving us a test!" said Michelle. 

Michelle said their teacher was giving________a test. 

(his/their/them/there)       (before/that night/the day before/the next day)

"My dad gave me fifty pounds!" said Neil.

Neil said_______________dad had given him fifty pounds. 

(his/their/them/there)       (before/that night/the day before/the next day)

"I scored a great goal yesterday" Marina said.

Marina said she had scored a great goal_____________ . 

(his/their/them/there)       (before/that night/the day before/the next day)

" We saw our cousin at the Fair", said Ben. 

Ben said they had seen____________cousin at the fair. 

(his/their/them/there)       (before/that night/the day before/the next day)

"I left my wallet here", Frank said. 

Frank said he had left his wallet______________ . 

(his/their/them/there)       (before/that night/the day before/the next day)

"I'll sleep well tonight!" said Arnie.

(his/their/them/there)       (before/that night/the day before/the next day)
